definition: solid rectangular parallelepiped, specified by a location and a placement coordinate system

definition_ml.en: solid rectangular parallelepiped, specified by a location and a placement coordinate system

note: NOTE 1  The block is specified by the positive lengths x, y, and z along the axes of the placement coordinate system, and has one vertex at the origin of the placement coordinate system.||NOTE 2  The property axis2_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the block whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

note_ml.en: NOTE 1  The block is specified by the positive lengths x, y, and z along the axes of the placement coordinate system, and has one vertex at the origin of the placement coordinate system.||NOTE 2  The property axis2_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the block whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.
